title: Misc attributes
description: Identity, metadata, composition, and debug attributes that don't fit other categories.

data.name: className
data.summary: Web-only. Additional CSS class names appended to the generated element.

data.name: generatedBy
data.description: AI generation command that created this component (metadata only, not rendered)
data.summary: Set by the generator to identify the spec that produced this file. Do not edit by hand; it drives `jui verify`.

data.name: id
data.summary: Unique identifier within the layout. Required for ViewModel references and test-runner selectors. Naming convention: `<screen>_<purpose>`.

data.name: include
data.description: Include another JSON layout (filename without extension)
data.summary: Reference to another Layout file, inlined at this position. Path is relative to the layouts root; no extension.

data.name: partial
data.description: Marks this file as a partial/include template. Partials are not standalone views and will not generate Data models.
data.summary: Marks the file as a partial layout that is only usable via `include`. Prevents direct routing.

data.name: tag
data.summary: Arbitrary marker string attached to the view. Useful for runtime debugging / analytics without polluting `id`.

data.name: testId
data.summary: Test-only identifier separate from `id`. Use when the test selector should not affect runtime accessibility IDs.

data.name: type
data.summary: The component type (`Label`, `Button`, `View`, ...). Required on every node. Not typically discussed as a user-facing attribute; listed here for completeness.
